anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1118: Imu's Identity Revealed!
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest One Piece manga chapter drops a bombshell as Imu's true form is finally shown, sparking massive theories about the Void Century. Fans are in a frenzy, with chapter sales breaking records.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Anime Film Announced for 2027
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio MAPPA reveals a brand-new Death Note film set in an alternate modern Tokyo, with original creator Tsugumi Ohba overseeing the story. Trailer drops next week.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto: Boruto TBV Chapter 15 – Jura's Attack on Konoha
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto: Two Blue Vortex Chapter 15 sees Jura launching a devastating assault on the Hidden Leaf, with Kawaki making a critical decision. Manga sales spike 200%.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima Episode 7: Goku's New Form Explained
anime_pulse_items.summary: Dragon Ball Daima introduces a surprising transformation as Goku taps into a 'Primal Saiyan' power. Episode 7 ratings hit 9.5/10 on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Trailer: Culling Game Arc Begins
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA drops the first trailer for Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3, revealing stunning animation for the Culling Game arc. Premieres July 2026 on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie Breaks $500M Worldwide
anime_pulse_items.summary: The Demon Slayer Infinity Castle film surpasses $500 million at the global box office in just two weeks, becoming the highest-grossing anime movie of 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Season – Special Episode 2 Reactions
anime_pulse_items.summary: The second special episode of Attack on Titan's finale airs, delving into the aftermath of the Rumbling. Reddit r/AttackOnTitan sees 1M+ comments within hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Chapter 430: Final War Aftermath
anime_pulse_items.summary: My Hero Academia's penultimate chapter reveals the fate of Deku and classmates post-war, setting up the ending. Fan theories explode on Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: New Trailer Reveals Reze Arc
anime_pulse_items.summary: Chainsaw Man Season 2 trailer showcases the Bomb Girl arc with intense action. Premieres June 2026 on Crunchyroll. Fans go wild over animation quality.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3: Mission Impossible Arc Begins
anime_pulse_items.summary: Spy x Family Season 3 premieres with a high-stakes mission for Loid and Yor, featuring new characters. Episode 1 scores 9.8/10 on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren takes home Anime of the Year at the 2026 Crunchyroll Anime Awards, with season 2 announced for fall 2026. Streaming numbers break records.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Jeju Island Arc Trailer Drops
anime_pulse_items.summary: Solo Leveling Season 2 trailer debuts, adapting the fan-favorite Jeju Island arc with stunning animation. Premieres July 2026 on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 10 New Simulcasts for Summer 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces 10 new simulcasts including 'Kaiju No. 8 Season 2' and 'Oshi no Ko Season 2' for Summer 2026. Full schedule released.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix Announces Live-Action 'One Piece' Season 2 Cast
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix reveals new cast for One Piece live-action season 2, including Chopper and Robin. Filming begins June 2026. Reddit debates casting choices.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'Devil May Cry' Anime Series Gets First Teaser
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix drops teaser for the upcoming Devil May Cry anime by Studio Mir, showcasing stylish action. Release date set for December 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit's r/anime Ranks Top 100 Anime of the Decade
anime_pulse_items.summary: Reddit's r/anime community publishes its Top 100 anime list (2016-2026), with 'Attack on Titan' taking #1. Thread goes viral with 500k+ upvotes.

anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Episode 1080: Luffy vs. Saturn Extended Fight
anime_pulse_items.summary: One Piece anime delivers a spectacular extended fight between Luffy and Saturn, with top-tier animation by Toei. Ratings hit 9.9/10 on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: Light Yagami Statue Sells Out in 24 Hours
anime_pulse_items.summary: A highly detailed 1/4 scale statue of Light Yagami with his Death Note sells out globally within a day. Resale prices triple on eBay.
